verses.1: Wine is a mocker and beer is a brawler.
verses.2: The terror of a king is like the roaring of a lion.
verses.3: It is an honor for a man to keep aloof from strife,
verses.4: The sluggard will not plow by reason of the winter;
verses.5: Counsel in the heart of man is like deep water,
verses.6: Many men claim to be men of unfailing love,
verses.7: A righteous man walks in integrity.
verses.8: A king who sits on the throne of judgment
verses.9: Who can say, “I have made my heart pure.
verses.11: Even a child makes himself known by his doings,
verses.12: The hearing ear, and the seeing eye,
verses.13: Don’t love sleep, lest you come to poverty.
verses.14: “It’s no good, it’s no good,” says the buyer;
verses.15: There is gold and abundance of rubies,
verses.16: Take the garment of one who puts up collateral for a stranger;
verses.17: Fraudulent food is sweet to a man,
verses.19: He who goes about as a tale-bearer reveals secrets;
verses.20: Whoever curses his father or his mother,
verses.21: An inheritance quickly gained at the beginning
verses.22: Don’t say, “I will pay back evil.”
verses.24: A man’s steps are from the LORD;
verses.25: It is a snare to a man to make a rash dedication,
verses.26: A wise king winnows out the wicked,
verses.27: The spirit of man is the LORD’s lamp,
verses.28: Love and faithfulness keep the king safe.
verses.29: The glory of young men is their strength.
